summary: Implemented HistoryChart improvements (Million units, time range selector 7D/15D/30D/All) and Windows taskbar enhancements (app name fix, overlay icon with % usage, window title with reset time).
current_status: All changes built successfully - Ready for testing
features_added: HistoryChart: Changed unit from K to M (Millions) with K fallback for small values
Taskbar: App name fixed (shows 'Usage Tracker' not 'electron')
Taskbar: Overlay icon showing colored circle based on usage level (green/yellow/red)
Taskbar: Window title shows % usage and reset time
Taskbar: Overlay tooltip shows percentage and time until reset
next_steps: Run npm run start to test the changes
Verify taskbar overlay icon appears with usage %
